tagline: Behavioral changes Review the following changes, which take effect when clusters restart on this runtime.
what_it_does: Behavioral changes Review the following changes, which take effect when clusters restart on this runtime. XPath: When evaluating XPath over XML, Databricks no longer loads external Document Type Definitions (DTDs). Queries that previously failed only because of an unreachable external DTD reference can now succeed.
why_it_matters: New features and improvements The following features and improvements are available in this release.

capabilities.title: Incrementally and efficiently process new
capabilities.desc: Incrementally and efficiently process new data files as they arrive in cloud storage.

capabilities.title: Delta Lake table streaming reads
capabilities.desc: Delta Lake table streaming reads and writes

capabilities.title: Use Delta Lake tables as
capabilities.desc: Use Delta Lake tables as streaming sources and sinks with exactly-once processing guarantees.
